text: Last class I went shopping and said what was wrong with too and not enough.
Today I want to visit a museum and talk about how things used to be.

My family used to visit this museum every summer.
We would spend the whole afternoon in the galleries.
The artist used to paint outside, in the fields.
I did not use to enjoy sculpture, but now I love it.
Excuse me, this collection is beautiful. Could you tell me more about the paintings in this gallery?
Of course. These are from the nineteenth century. The artists used to paint outside, in the open air, which was a new idea back then.
How interesting. When I was a girl, my family used to visit a small museum, and we would spend the whole afternoon there. Where is the masterpiece?
The masterpiece is a portrait at the far end of the portrait gallery, upstairs. It is almost two hundred years old.
Wonderful. I did not use to enjoy portraits, but I have changed. Does my admission ticket include the special exhibit too?
Yes, it does. One admission gives you every gallery and the special exhibit, all day. Please enjoy the collection.
Does the admission ticket include every gallery?
Could you tell me where the masterpiece is?
My family used to visit museums every summer.
We would spend the whole afternoon there.
This is a wonderful collection of paintings.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the National Museum of Art. My name is Daniel, and I will be your guide this morning. Before we begin, here are a few things to know. Your admission ticket includes all four galleries on this floor, as well as the special exhibit on the second floor. We will start in the main gallery, where you can see our most famous collection of paintings from the nineteenth century. The artists in this room used to paint in the open air, out in the fields and gardens, which was a new idea at the time. Many of them would return to the same spot again and again to capture the changing light. After that, we will visit the sculpture hall, and then the portrait gallery upstairs. Please remember that photography without flash is welcome, but please do not touch the works of art. Our most valuable masterpiece, a portrait that is almost two hundred years old, is at the far end of the portrait gallery. If you have any questions during the tour, please feel free to ask. Now, if you would all follow me, let us begin in the main gallery.

Hi Tuca, it is me. I just got home from the art museum and I had to tell you about it. Honestly, it was wonderful. When I was a girl, my grandmother used to take me to that same museum every summer, and we would spend the whole afternoon there. Today it brought all those memories back. The new exhibit on the second floor is incredible. There is a collection of paintings from the nineteenth century, and one portrait in particular stopped me in my tracks. The guide called it the masterpiece of the whole museum, and I can see why. I also loved the sculpture hall, although when I was younger I never used to enjoy sculpture at all. I have changed, I suppose. The admission was not expensive, and one ticket gives you all the galleries for the whole day. You really should go, and take your time. When you do, send me a photo of your favorite piece. Talk soon. Bye.

First, Tuca bought her admission ticket at the entrance and picked up a map of the galleries. Then she walked into the main gallery and looked at the collection of paintings from the nineteenth century. After that, she found the masterpiece, an old portrait that the guide had described. Next, she visited the sculpture hall and spent some time with one large sculpture she loved. Finally, she sat on a bench, remembered how her family used to visit museums together, and decided to come back again soon.
